title: Build a Final Exams Table
description: An HTML table displaying calculus final exam grades for five students. The table uses caption, thead, tbody, and tfoot elements for semantic structure, with th elements for column headers and a colspan attribute in the footer to span the average grade cell across two columns.
objectives: Use table, thead, tbody, and tfoot to structure a data table
Add a caption element to describe the table
Use th for header cells and td for data cells
Use the colspan attribute to merge cells across columns

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Calculus Final Exam Grades
Last Name First Name Grade
Davis Alex 54
Doe Samantha 92
Rodriguez Marcus 88
Thompson Jane 77
Williams Natalie 83
Average Grade 78.8
